transcript:
Speaker A (Robot): ಏನ್ ಮಾಡ್ತಿದೀಯಾ [What are you doing?]
Speaker B (Human): I sleeping.
Speaker A (Robot): I'm sleeping ಅಂತ ಹೇಳ್ಬೇಕು. ಸ್ವಲ್ಪ ಫಾರ್ಮಲ್ ಆಗಿ I'm getting some sleep ಅಂತ ಕೂಡ ಹೇಳಬಹುದು. [You should say 'I'm sleeping'. Formally, you can also say 'I'm getting some sleep'.]
Speaker B (Human): ಓ ಹೌದಾ? ಇಂಗ್ಲಿಷ್ ಹೇಗೆ ಕಲಿಬೇಕು? [Oh really? How to learn English?]
Speaker A (Robot): ನನ್ನ ಜೊತೆ ಪ್ರತಿದಿನ 15 minutes daily practice ಮಾಡಿದ್ರೆ ಸಾಕು. 1 month ಅಲ್ಲಿ ಇಂಗ್ಲಿಷ್ ಕಲಿಬಹುದು. [Just practice with me for 15 minutes daily. You can learn English in 1 month.]
Speaker B (Human): ಇದಕ್ಕೆ ತುಂಬಾ ಖರ್ಚಾಗುತ್ತಾ? [Does this cost a lot?]
Speaker A (Robot): ಕೇವಲ 1 Rupee ಗೆ ಈ ಆಪ್ ಸಂಪೂರ್ಣವಾಗಿ ಟ್ರೈ ಮಾಡಬಹುದು. 1 Crores+ people ನನ್ನ ಜೊತೆ ಇಂಗ್ಲಿಷ್ ಕಲಿತಾ ಇದ್ದಾರೆ. [You can try this app completely for just 1 Rupee. Over 1 Crore+ people are learning English with me.]
Speaker B (Human): ಸೂಪರ್, ಹೇಗೆ ಜಾಯಿನ್ ಆಗೋದು? [Super, how to join?]
Speaker A (Robot): ಈಗಲೇ MySivi ಆಪ್ ಡೌನ್ಲೋಡ್ ಮಾಡಿ ಇಂಗ್ಲಿಷ್ ಕಲಿಯೋದನ್ನ ಶುರು ಮಾಡು. [Download the MySivi app now and start learning English.]
Speaker C (Voiceover): Click on install now and download MySivi app.
on_screen_text:
ಏನ್ ಮಾಡ್ತಿದೀಯಾ [What are you doing?]
SLEEPING
ಅಂತ [that]
ಸ್ವಲ್ಪ [a little]
ಫಾರ್ಮಲ್ [formal]
ಆಗಿ [as]
I'M GETTING SOME SLEEP
ಅಂತ ಕೂಡ [also like]
ಹೇಳಬಹುದು [can say]
15 Minutes
DAILY PRACTICE
1 Month
ENGLISH
1 Rupee Only
1 CRORES+ PEOPLE
MySivi AI English Speaking App
Install
MySivi English speaking app Install Now
summary: An AI robot corrects a human's English grammar in bed, demonstrating the MySivi app. The robot explains that users can practice English for 15 minutes daily and learn within a month for just 1 Rupee. The ad ends with a call to action to install the MySivi app.
